title: SB60: June UN Climate Meetings
summary: The 60th Subsidiary Bodies SB 60 session of the UNFCCC, also known as the Bonn Climate Change Conference, was held...

UN to Convene Global Experts in Tokyo on 4-6 March to Assess Climate Action Targets under Sustainable Development Goals
UNEA Adopts a Bold Resolution on Promoting Synergies in Environmental Action
summary: 26 February 1 March 2024, Nairobi, Kenya Leading the way in this rapidly expanding field, Japan put forward a resolution...

title: Webinar - Stay green, shine on the market: How the EU Ecolabel brings environmental excellence to your tourist accommodation
summary: Join the webinar on 16 March to learn all you need to know about the EU Ecolabel for tourist accommodation services – the benefits the label brings to your business, how to apply and more!

title: A fresh coat: EU Ecolabel levels up for Paints & Varnishes
summary: The EU Ecolabel criteria for paints and varnishes got a fresh coating! Read more about the revised requirements.

title: New package of measures to boost circular economy and strengthen Europe's plastic recycling
summary: The European Commission has unveiled a first set of pilot actions to accelerate Europe's transition to a circular economy, with a particular focus on the plastics sector.

title: Savour the indoors with EU Ecolabel this winter
summary: This winter, let your interior reflect your sustainable choices, with well-crafted pieces chosen with intention. The EU Ecolabel guides you towards choices that resonate.

title: Commission extends nitrates derogation for Ireland
summary: The Commission extended Ireland's derogation under the Nitrates Directive for a further three years, starting 1 January 2026. This decision follows the approval of the Commission's proposal by Member States on 9 December.

title: Smart and sustainable: the EU Ecolabel as a useful tool in green public procurement
summary: Why should public procurers choose EU Ecolabel products? Click to find out!

title: Commission leads efforts to tackle Baltic Sea challenges
summary: Commissioner Roswall hosted the ‘Our Baltic Conference’ in Stockholm, aimed at addressing environmental challenges facing the region.

title: When pawprint meets footprint
summary: The first animal care product has been awarded the EU Ecolabel. Developed by Catalan manufacturer PROQUIMIA, the certified shampoo is a major step toward sustainable pet hygiene. Discover PROQUIMIA’s story and apply for the label to help ‘paw’ the way in sustainable pet care!

title: One Label. More than 100,000 greener products. One Catalogue.
summary: Explore the revamped online Product Catalogue and discover EU Ecolabel certified goods and services in a few clicks!

title: New EU Ecolabel tender call for stakeholder representation
summary: Good news! The EU Ecolabel Stakeholder Representation call for tender has been published on the EU Funding & Tenders Portal! Think that your organisation could make a difference? Submit your bid!

title: New EU ship recycling list includes first German facility
summary: Inclusion on the list authorises shipyards to service large EU-flagged vessels while ensuring adherence to strict standards.

title: Pallet wrapping & straps exempt from 100% reuse requirement
summary: The exclusion comes under the EU's Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation (PPWR), which entered into force in February.

title: New urban air quality modelling of ‘road dust’ and ‘street canyons’ could help address harmful impacts of road traffic, says Polish study
summary: To tackle urban air pollution, we need to understand the sources of harmful emissions. A new modelling approach tested in Warsaw could help better distinguish between emissions from traffic and heating.

title: Rodent study models how human-affecting virus spreads across Western Europe
summary: A study explores how the disease nephropathia epidemica is spread to humans by European bank voles. It demonstrates how changes in climate and land cover impact outbreak location and intensity.

title: Norway study reveals how hospital sewage is spreading antimicrobial resistance
summary: Researchers use genetic techniques to analyse sewage samples from hospitals in the Scandinavian country, demonstrating that effluent contains both known and previously unknown antibiotic-resistant genes.

title: Vaasa's 'One Song Shower' campaign - sing your way to water savings!
summary: As part of its European Green Leaf title for 2026, the city of Vaasa is introducing a clever campaign to reduce water consumption. The One Song Shower challenge encourages residents to limit their showers to the length of a three-minute song.

title: Progress made on biodiversity, but swifter action needed
summary: A new report on biodiversity finds that the EU is on track to achieve 16 out of 45 targets, even if it must act faster.

title: New global science highlights business risks from nature loss
summary: The assessment comes as the EU is stepping up its push for greater investment and private finance for nature.

title: The ECESP's new leadership groups have been set up!
summary: Click if you are interested in joining one of the European Circular Economy Stakeholder Platform (ECESP) Coordination Group's new leadership groups.

title: New legislation gives EU Ecolabel big thumbs up
summary: The EU Ecolabel is preparing for a major boost thanks to the new and upcoming legislation.  Discover how our labelling scheme supports the EU's green transition.

title: Monitoring report on progress towards the SDGs in an EU context — 2024
summary: Eurostat has published the ‘Sustainable development in the European Union — 2024 monitoring report on progress towards the SDGs in an EU context'.

title: Bringing sustainable tourism into the spotlight: the EU Ecolabel for tourist accommodation
summary: Trustworthy, inspiring, sustainable, creating change: these are the words the audience associated with the EU Ecolabel in the latest webinar, ‘Bring tourist accommodation into the green spotlight with the EU Ecolabel’.

title: Europeans continue to feel directly affected by environmental issues and policy
summary: A new Eurobarometer survey found that more than three-quarters of citizens believe the environment has a direct impact on their daily life.

title: Europe’s bathing waters remain safe
summary: The majority of bathing water sites in 2023 met the EU's most stringent quality standards, according to the latest annual report.

title: EU Ecolabel Webinar: Opportunities for businesses in tourist accommodation
summary: Join the webinar ‘Bring tourist accommodation into the green spotlight with the EU Ecolabel’ on 11 June 2024 to learn all you need to know about the EU Ecolabel, how it works, its future perspectives and discover the opportunities it offers to tourist accommodations.

title: EU continues its engagement in global water cooperation
summary: From 18-25 May, EU representatives will be attending the 10th edition of the World Water Forum in Bali, Indonesia.

title: How the EU Ecolabel helps reduce water waste and pollution
summary: It’s time to be water wise! The EU's new #WaterWiseEU campaign aims to raise awareness about water related issues, showcase solutions and inspire change. Learn how EU Ecolabel products are part of the solution!

title: How the EU Ecolabel helps us all make informed choices
summary: Amidst a sea of green claims and labels, discover how the EU Ecolabel guides people to separate genuine sustainability efforts from marketing hype! Join the movement as the EU Ecolabel Showroom on Wheels tours Europe, empowering consumers to make informed choices.

title: EU Ecolabel Showroom on Wheels gears up for Olympic-inspired adventure!
summary: As Olympic fever rises, the EU Ecolabel's sporty Showroom on Wheels takes to the road to champion eco-friendly products and raise awareness across EU Member States.
